Columns.Name: 保証_保証書発行待ち件数
保証_自動発行待ち件数
保証_郵送手配待ち件数
保証_郵送依頼待ち件数

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.warranty_issue_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "保証_保証書発行待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.auto_issue_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "保証_自動発行待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.warranty_check_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "保証_保証確認中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.purchase_order_waiting_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "保証_発注書待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.warrany_pending_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "保証_保証保留件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.warranty_mailing_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "保証_郵送手配待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.mailing_request_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "保証_郵送依頼待ち件数"
   FROM (t_object_warranty main
     JOIN m_warranty_status sub ON ((main.warranty_status_id = sub.warranty_status_id)))
  WHERE ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM t_object_order o
          WHERE ((o.object_order_id = main.object_order_id) AND (o.active_flg = 1)))) AND ((sub.warranty_issue_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.auto_issue_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.warranty_check_flg = 1) OR (sub.purchase_order_waiting_flg = 1) OR (sub.warrany_pending_flg = 1) OR (sub.warranty_mailing_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.mailing_request_wait_flg = 1)));
